entities.description: As a subsection of '3电气特性', this section provides an overview of the electrical characteristics of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, detailing specifications such as voltage, current, and signal integrity.
Refers to the technical specifications and performance parameters of the hardware, as outlined in section 3.1.

relations.description: The concept of 'Electrical Characteristics' is the primary topic of section 3.1.
